_meta: VERIFIED 2026 offensive-line tiers (web research, June 2026, cited). Replaces the unreliable fusion oline_pctl (which had DET at 6.6 pctl — clearly wrong for an elite OL — and only 13 distinct values across 32 teams). Sources: Sharp Football 2026 OL rankings (Jun 24 2026, forward-looking, all 32), cross-checked vs 4for4 2026 projected OL rankings and PFN OLi. tier 5=elite,4=good,3=avg,2=below,1=poor. pctl = tier->percentile-equivalent used by the deep/vertical lever gate (<=30 suppress, >=70 reward).

DET.note: fell from 3rd; Sewell to LT, rookie RT

NE.note: hinges on rookie LT Will Campbell

DAL.note: Tyler Smith elite; LT/C health Qs

BAL.note: lost Linderbaum + rookie LG, interior turnover

LV.note: added Linderbaum; Miller back from injury

GB.note: Morgan to LT unproven, Rhyan at C

CIN.note: ran back a bad unit, 30th YBC
